prompt_text:
### Demographics: 60-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 15 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs; Intermittent GI discomfort (nausea/bloating)

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent)
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Orthopedic fracture (healed)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis); HF (No); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (father)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 78.9 kg; Height 160.8 cm; BMI 30.5 kg/m²; Blood pressure 129/80 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.5%; 9 months ago 8.2%; 6 months ago 8.5%; 3 months ago 8.0%; current 7.9%), FPG (12 months ago 235mg/dL; 9 months ago 224mg/dL; 6 months ago 184mg/dL; 3 months ago 187mg/dL; current 162mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 79.8kg; 9 months ago 78.2kg; 6 months ago 76.7kg; 3 months ago 76.8kg; current 78.9kg), Height (12 months ago 160.8cm; 9 months ago 160.8cm; 6 months ago 160.8cm; 3 months ago 160.8cm; current 160.8cm), BMI (12 months ago 31.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 30.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 30.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 30.0kg/m²; current 30.5kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 129mmHg; 9 months ago 124mmHg; 6 months ago 129mmHg; 3 months ago 126mmHg; current 129mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 80mmHg; 9 months ago 79mmHg; 6 months ago 80mmHg; 3 months ago 83mmHg; current 80mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 21U/L; 9 months ago 15U/L; 6 months ago 15U/L; 3 months ago 21U/L; current 18U/L), AST (12 months ago 13U/L; 9 months ago 14U/L; 6 months ago 17U/L; 3 months ago 13U/L; current 16U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.6mg/dL; current 0.6mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 10mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 9.9mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 5.0mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 6.8mL/min/1.73m²; current 4mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 485mg/g; 9 months ago 553mg/g; 6 months ago 436mg/g; 3 months ago 425mg/g; current 599mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 78mg/dL; 9 months ago 75mg/dL; 6 months ago 83mg/dL; 3 months ago 76mg/dL; current 79mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 52mg/dL; 9 months ago 52mg/dL; 6 months ago 50mg/dL; 3 months ago 53mg/dL; current 51mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 142mg/dL; 9 months ago 126mg/dL; 6 months ago 130mg/dL; 3 months ago 145mg/dL; current 137mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.0g/dL; 6 months ago 11.2g/dL; 3 months ago 11.0g/dL; current 11.1g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
